rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Case Title: TOM VS DELTA DENTAL PLAN OF CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defts Delta Dental Plan Of California And Jan Melton'S Ntc Of Mo For Summary Adjudication, Calendar Motion: Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO GENDER DISCRIMINATION. SEE YURICK VS. SUP. CT 209 CAL APP 1116 (1989). SEE OKOLI VS. LOCKHEED TECHNICAL OPERATIONS 36 CAL APP 4TH 1607 (1995). REASONABLE INVESTIGATION WOULD NOT LIKELY DISCOVER GENDER DISCRIMINATION. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Ntc Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended X-Compl
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Order Sealing Court'S File And Specified Particulars And For Protective Order *** $23.00 Motion Fee Paid Receipt # 522879 ***
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS DENIED. MOTION MUST BE "NARROWLY TAILORED." MOTION SEEKS AN OPEN ENDED SEALING ORDER - OFFER TO LIMIT IN REPLY COMES TO LATE. (PB)
DENY, NO NEW FACTS AND NEW LAW CITED IN REPLY. THE UNDERLYING PAPERS RAISED THE AGENCY ARGUMENT. IN FACT, AT PGS. 3-4 OF THE UNDERLYING OPPOSITION, PLAINTIFF EXPRESSLY REFERRED TO AGENCY. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: COHEN VS CALIF STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOC
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE AS UNOPPOSED. OVERRULED AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF UPA. (PB)

DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND 1ST, 2ND, & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION NO OPPOSITION. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IIED SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD OVERRULED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION DEMURRER SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 8TH & 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE NO OPPOSITION. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: ADECCO, INC. VS. ALERT STAFFING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR INJUNCTION GRANTED - 1)PREVENTING DEFENDANT FROM DISPOSING OF COLLATERAL EXCEPT FOR EQUIVALENT CONSIDERATION IN ORDINARY COURSE OF BUSINESS. 2)PREVENTING LOW FROM RECEIVING ANY SALARY OR OTHER COMPENSATION BEYOND MINIMUM COMPENSATION GIVEN FINANCIAL CIRCUMSTANCES OF DEFENDANT. (NR)
